name: Qurtys
short_description: Qurtys is an inventory-strategy autobattler! You must play as many cards as possible in a single round to upgrade your equipment using the power of your Spirit Animals and withstand your opponents through countless rounds.
detailed_description:
In this world, you face countless opponents and must upgrade your inventory during each shopping phase to keep up with them.

Classes

There are four different types of themes, each played in a unique way. However, they all encourage you to play as many cards as possible. The power of animals helps you upgrade your equipment or generate long-term income.

Characters

Additionally, there are various characters, each with unique abilities to make your life easier.

Leaderboard

Fight your way to the top of the leaderboard and make a name for yourself.

Items

There are many different items, each with unique attributes. Combine them wisely in your inventory to achieve the best synergy.
